programme.desc: Aza Yah demands her stick and her cowrie shells from Kongouet Bian. She wants to destroy him, but he manages to persuade her not to harm him.

programme.title: Mauvaise Graine
programme.desc: Deprived of his favourite car by his father, a young idler joins a gang of car thieves. There he falls in love with the muse of the gang, but above all he must be wary of the kingpin who runs it. The first steps of a filmmaker destined to become one of Hollywood's greatest.

programme.title: Ya Benti
programme.desc: Sabrina, lesbian, is about to marry Younes, her childhood friend, who is also gay. A marriage that suits both of them because it reassures and delights their families. But on the eve of the ceremony, Sabrina begins to have doubts.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Visa And Travel
programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: How The Global Economy Can Navigate The Impact Of The War In Iran
programme.desc: Interview with Paschal Donohoe, Managing Director of the World Bank

programme.title: Of Rhinos And Men
programme.desc: A win for wildlife, a loss for humans. African nature reserves are restricting indigenous peoples' access to rivers and forests - and, in doing so, are endangering their very existence.

programme.title: How The Global Economy Can Navigate The Impact Of The War In Iran
programme.desc: Interview with Paschal Donohoe, Managing Director of the World Bank

programme.title: Who's To Blame For Cameroon's Woes?
programme.desc: Supporters say President Paul Biya stabilized Cameroon. Critics say he's stalled democracy amid long festering armed conflict and economic stagnation. So how does Cameroon move forward? Political scientist and Biya's ex-Minister of Forestry and Wildlife Elvis Ngolle Ngolle joins Under The Baobab.

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Prove It!
programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Trip to India
programme.desc: For hamsters' day, Zoe and Milo want to surprise Alim by making confetti to throw on their little friend. But Alim knows a place on earth where people celebrate by throwing something more interesting than confetti up in the air. Our heroes land in Rajasthan, India.

programme.title: Rhino - Runaway
programme.desc: As the rhino bends to drink from a pool of water, his horn hits a rock that prevents his head from reaching down. This is the beginning of a annoying afternoon that involves getting some water. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: Looking for Miniscule Microbes
programme.desc: How can microbes be of use at a birthday party? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of microorganisms. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with yeast, and get to know Satoshi Omura, a biochemist, who discovered medicine inside miniscule microbes.

programme.title: When Yellow Met Blue
programme.desc: One sunny afternoon, Luna paints her backyard, but her yellow sun turns green! With Jupiter and Clyde, she dives into the painting to discover how yellow became green.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: The Big Dig
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on a big dig adventure to find dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Fingers on Buzzers!
programme.desc: The doctors supersize tiny air sacs inside your lungs - your awesome alveoli! And it's fingers on buzzers in Ouchology – who will get snotted?

programme.title: Vispy Kharadi: Martial Arts Strong Man
programme.desc: Serial GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS record-breaker and skilled martial artist Vispy Kharadi reveals what it takes to become the best and demonstrates some martial arts moves and self-defense techniques.

programme.title: Fingers on Buzzers!
programme.desc: The doctors supersize tiny air sacs inside your lungs - your awesome alveoli! And it's fingers on buzzers in Ouchology – who will get snotted?

programme.title: Against all Odds
programme.desc: With days to go until the British Championships, Josh comes down with flu, Adriano returns from Italy with a surprise for Ella, and Charlie gets an offer he can't refuse.

programme.title: Circles Get Around
programme.desc: Did you know you could draw a perfect circle by using your pinky finger? In this episode we introduce basic geometric constructions and explain the importance of fixed pivot-points. Are you up for the challenge? Eric is!

programme.title: Star Power
programme.desc: In this episode, we use the kirigami method to make our own pentagram: the 5-pointed star famous for being a magical symbol. If Eric can do it, you can do it, too! It's not magic ... it's math!

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Trip to India
programme.desc: For hamsters' day, Zoe and Milo want to surprise Alim by making confetti to throw on their little friend. But Alim knows a place on earth where people celebrate by throwing something more interesting than confetti up in the air. Our heroes land in Rajasthan, India.

programme.title: The Big Dig
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on a big dig adventure to find dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Looking for Miniscule Microbes
programme.desc: How can microbes be of use at a birthday party? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of microorganisms. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with yeast, and get to know Satoshi Omura, a biochemist, who discovered medicine inside miniscule microbes.

programme.title: Prove It!
programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Fingers on Buzzers!
programme.desc: The doctors supersize tiny air sacs inside your lungs - your awesome alveoli! And it's fingers on buzzers in Ouchology – who will get snotted?

programme.title: The Big Dig
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on a big dig adventure to find dinosaur bones.

programme.title: French In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. programme.title: What The Villains Have To Say
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being 'dirty, noxious, and ugly.' But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: E1 - The Drakensberg: Barrier of Spears
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the wildlife of The Drakensberg Mountain range. We take a look at how creatures survive in the hostile landscape, from the highest peaks to the rolling grasslands below.

programme.title: E2 - Gardens in the Clouds
programme.desc: The plants and animals of the Cloud Mountains have long captured our imagination. In a landscape defined by weather and threatened by invaders, see how indigenous forests survive by providing a sanctuary for life while opening a door to the past.

programme.desc: This documentary looks at the wildlife of The Drakensberg Mountain range. We take a look at how creatures survive in the hostile landscape, from the highest peaks to the rolling grasslands below.

programme.title: E1 - The Drakensberg: Barrier of Spears

programme.title: E812 - Grandpa Pig's Metal Detector

programme.title: E216 - Pups' Adventures In Babysitting / Pups Save The Fireworks
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway calls on the Paw Patrol to rescue her twin niece and nephew from a tree, and then twin sit for the day! // Expecting the fireworks for Adventure Bay Day, Mayor Goodway receives a package of piglets after a mix-up!

programme.title: E104 - From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E109 - Tres Leches Trouble / Wizzle Wozzle Woo
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Benny have to trek through the rainforest to deliver a big, delicate tres leches cake to Benny's abuela. // Dora and the Fiesta Trio investigate a loud, strange noise that caused them to lose their instruments.

programme.desc: The other Titans train Beast Boy in the ways of the ninja.

programme.desc: Buttercup is knocked off-kilter by a mysterious force.

But when a mysterious tiara causes trouble for the contestants, they realise there are bigger problems at hand.

programme.title: E407 - Tuzki The Intern/Abduction/Wrong Date
programme.desc: Tuzki is back as the new intern at the lab & he has a new mission - to capture Lamput! How can he do that to his friend?

programme.title: E110 - Stormy Sleepover, Part 2 - Jeffrey Wendle/Stormy Sleepover, Part 3 - Badgers N' Bunke
programme.desc: Mary and Chad are relieved to have a quiet day with Clarence¿s friend Jeff. Unlike Clarence, Jeff is polite, organized, and clean. However, they soon suspect there's something Jeff is hiding from them!

programme.title: E468 - The Battle Of The Sacred Crown/Were-Lemming/Hold-Up, Hens & Yummy/Ever Higher/Witchcr
programme.desc: The Lemmings find a stuffed animal factory that might allow them to win against Grizzy for a crown.

programme.title: Fagara
programme.desc: After her father died, a Hong Kong girl discovers she has two hitherto unknown sisters, one in Taiwan and one in China. To settle her father's debt, she must reunite with them to run the family's hot pot restaurant. While the androgynous Taiwan sister is plagued by her toxic relationship with her mother, the fashionista sister from China is trying to fend off her grandmother's pressure to get married. Meanwhile, she is striving to unshackle herself from her ex-boyfriend in order to start a new relationship.

programme.title: Under the Light
programme.desc: Su Jianming, the son of Deputy Mayor Zheng Gang of Jinjiang City, defies his father's counsel and attends a cunning dinner invitation from the wealthiest man in Jinjiang City, Li Zhitian. To his astonishment, he becomes an unwilling witness to a shocking incident where someone is coerced into thrusting their hand into a simmering hotpot. As past mysteries resurface, hidden factions from various quarters plot and scheme, employing intricate strategies, scrutiny, and suspicion. Amidst the web of conflicting desires, the pressing question remains: who will ultimately unveil the final mask?

programme.title: Man In Love
programme.desc: A-cheng is a rogue who relies on debt collection for living. He lives in the attic of a small barber shop managed by his elder brother. It's time for a 37-year-old adult to live on his own, but he always ignores all contempt from others. One day, he goes to the hospital to collect a debt from a creditor in coma, there he meets Hao-ting, daughter of the creditor. She is forced to sign a debt transferring contract without any complaint. Her silhouette of silently taking care of her father deeply attracts A-cheng, a guy who never had responsibility before. A-cheng clumsily draws a “graffiti contract” to offset Hao-ting's debts with walks and dinners as dating, even tries his best to manage the funeral for her father. Hao-ting feels touched by his behaviors and accepts his pursuit. Unexpectedly, a barter gambling takes away their future ruthlessly. A-cheng is not only imprisoned, also diagnosed with hemangioma. He has not much time left...At that moment, A-cheng finally understan

programme.title: Mrs. K
programme.desc: Mrs. K is a housewife who lives in a quiet suburban neighborhood with her husband Mr. K and their daughter Lil' K. One day, a Macau ex-cop shows up to blackmail Mrs. K. He knows about her unseemly past. She agrees to his term and they meet. The deal goes sour as she attempts to get rid of him. He escapes and is captured by a stranger. After finding out why Ex-cop is mixed up in this, the stranger kills him. They are after Mrs. K for different reasons. Ex-cop is someone who stumbles upon Mrs. K's identity and decides to try his luck. The stranger, however, bears a grudge against Mrs. K. Things would date back more than ten years ago when a Macau casino was robbed. The robbery was carried out by a band of professionals and was led by none other than Mrs. K...

programme.title: Best Supporting Actors: Love Off The Cuff
programme.desc: Back together since Love in the Buff, Jimmy and Cherie strive to stay together happily ever after. But the shocking news of Cherie's philandering father marrying a girl younger than herself does not make things any easier for Cherie...

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Dream Of Desire
programme.desc: Fat Chiu and Frankie live together on a temporary basis. During their stay at home, they spend time with one of the home-mate Kwan and consequently build up very close relationship. Sally, who is Frankie's girlfriend, is deeply in romance with Frankie. However, when Pauline, a billionaire turns up, Frankie is crazily attracted by her. He decides to give up Sally. On the other hand, Fat Chiu immediately proceeds his plan and shows his care and love to Sally. Although Sally is so touched of the sincerity of Fat Chiu and accepts his offer, she knows she still loves Frankie. Kwan opines that Sally is damaging female dignity. Likewise, Kwan also disgraces Frankie as he sacrifices both his lover and friendship, simply because of his personal desire...

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: The story is set in the Ming dynasty. 'Holy Sword' requests a fight with secret agent 009's friend 'God of Sword' to decide the world's best swordsman. During the contest on the roof of the Forbidden City, 009 realises that 'Holy Sword' has sent a double to fight in his place, while he plans to assassinate the emperor. 'Holy Sword' finds himself surrounded by thousands of palace guards but is rescued by 'God of Sword', who wants to complete their championship...

programme.title: All Night Long
programme.desc: Teacher Wang is being held hostage one night by a bank robber in an all-night shop. Shop attendant Ling-ling and Wang struggle with the badly wounded robber, who dies in the fight. With two more accomplices, the four girls decide to destroy the body and split the $40 million the man has on him. But his gangs catch up with the girls and are about to rape and then kill them...

programme.title: Legendary Award Winners: Heart Of Dragon
programme.desc: It's the two brothers of Hong Kong action as you have never seen them before in a gripping drama where the lines blur between family loyalty and upholding the law. Jackie Chan plays Ted, a SWAT officer with thwarted dreams of being a sailor because he has to look after his mentally disabled brother Danny. The resentment boils over in a terse showdown between the two brothers. When Danny accidentally ends up with a robbery loot while playing a harmless game of cops and robbers with his friends, Ted has to make an agonizing decision. Does he save the hapless Danny? Or arrest him?

programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Barcelona: A Love Untold
programme.desc: Seth, a wealthy and commitment‑phobic playboy, meets Pia, a guarded and career‑driven woman burdened by past trauma, during a chance encounter in Santorini, Greece. Despite their clashing personalities, they spend a transformative summer together. When fear and family conflicts drive them apart, Seth must confront his immaturity and fight for love as their parents' business rivalry threatens any chance of a future together.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]
programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: Radyo Patrol Balita
programme.desc: Teleradyo Program

programme.title: Magandang Buhay[Live]
programme.desc: MAGANDANG BUHAY is a talkshow hosted by Karla Estrada, Jolina Magdangal, and Melai Cantiveros.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E209 - The Girl Who Cried Danger
programme.desc: Volt and ShoutOut hatch a plan to stop their super-clinger fan from making false alarm emergency calls.

programme.title: E223 - iCarly Awards
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: E261 - Lighthouse Louie / Hiccup Plague
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion. // No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.desc: Lady Upturn introduces Squidward, and his musical 'talents', to her high society friends after she becomes his patron.

programme.desc: Bunny must punish Patrick for chocolate-flavored crimes. // The Lawnies vote for what Patrick does next.

programme.title: E302 - Chopping Spree
programme.desc: Pat The Hapless goes on a barbaric quest to the shopping mall.

programme.title: E212 - Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Lily and Jack are half-siblings thrown together for a summer who must learn how to navigate their new family dynamic while also helping with the Wylde Pak family's chaotic pet grooming business.

programme.title: E239 - iSpace Out
programme.desc: A quirky billionaire asks Carly and her friends to put on the first live Web show from outer space, so they undergo tests for space travel. Meanwhile, a strange little girl visits Spencer at the loft.

programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.desc: The contestants are taken by a door--?less helicopter to the base of a raging waterfall, instructed to ascend on the most gruelling journey to date. Hunger sets in, and teams rely on Bear for strength to continue. Meanwhile, one team hits their breaking point.

programme.title: E5 - Singapore
programme.desc: Jack cooks his dad’s steak and kidney pudding recipe at home in Cornwall, before taking it to Singapore. He makes a deconstructed version of the traditional British dish.

programme.title: E6 - Tallin
programme.desc: Jack wants to share his favourite childhood breakfast dish with the locals of Tallinn, Estonia. He makes smoked kipper and poached eggs with an Estonian twist.

programme.desc: Claudia turns to her dad Steve for help when she fears the biggest sale of her mining career is slipping through her fingers.

programme.desc: Tension boils over between Claudia, Robin and Josh as they make a last-ditch attempt to close a deal with a buyer from Vietnam.

programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. programme.title: E36 - In Uzes (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Gard olive oil and in the Fenestrelle Tower.

programme.title: E3 - Autumn As The Water Flows
programme.desc: In the autumn Switzerland's lakes don the most vibrant shades of gold. Whether on the lakes of the Bernese Oberland, Lake Maggiore or in the Trois-Lacs-Jura region, everyone lives in harmony with the season.

programme.title: E13 - The Paulin Brothers
programme.desc: The Paulin brothers grew up in Le Reposoir, a small village nestled in the heart of the Aravis, and each chose his own way to live the mountain to the extreme. One walks barefoot on a slackline stretched between two dizzying points, the other climbs the most demanding faces of the Mont-Blanc massif.

programme.title: E100
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.desc: In the Bernese Oberland, above 800 metres winter seems suspended with no trace of snow on the shores of Lake Brienz. Markus continues to work wood in tune with tradition. On Lake Zurich, Manuel is in search of Asian clams whilst Angelo ensures the water taxis run to schedule.

programme.title: E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E13 - Eating Habits, Five Years After The Pandemic
programme.desc: Since 2020, several disruptions have changed the habits of consumers. What are they? Also: the flavors of maple, why we love sweet foods so much, culinary traditions around Ramadan.

programme.title: E13 - The Paulin Brothers

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E78
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Craig Smart in Perth.

programme.title: E3 - Queensland
programme.desc: Craig visits a family who turned their pet's battle with arthritis into a business. Halina meets an entrepreneur risking everything to prove he can farm seafood anywhere in the world.

programme.title: E79
programme.desc: Start your Tuesday with all the news you need. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest overnight news, interviews and the top stories this morning, plus Catherine Murphy with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: E79
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: E5 - Bruny Island
programme.desc: Gina Chick returns to Tasmania, this time crisscrossing Bruny Island to meet locals who reveal how Indigenous people and native species were ravaged to the brink of extinction but are now experiencing renewal and regeneration.

programme.title: E14 - Ella Hooper
programme.desc: Alice and Ella Hooper cook up a storm together, delivering a pho on the go and a classic food pairing that Ella is NOT a fan of!

programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

E6 - Nature’s Wonders for Earth Week
programme.desc: Explore nature’s wonders for Earth Week! Blippi flies into a volcano to see what makes it erupt & plays 'The Floor is Lava!' Then, he climbs Mt. Everest with a Yeti & flies to the clouds to see how snowflakes are made. The wonders continue as Blippi learns how a rainbow gets its colors, travels through the solar system & shrinks down to visit a beehive!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E1 - 24位少年開啟腦力之戰
programme.desc: 邀請了馬清運、伊能靜、楊芸晴等嘉賓擔任「超腦護航員」；節目根據“八大未來力”的概念來進行項目設置，少年們需要用創造性思維激發想像力，利用從紙筆到程式設計來破解難題，從而喚醒大腦活力，選拔出最具“未來力”的少年。

programme.title: E2 - 職業揭秘女嘉賓爆哭？
programme.desc: 30+的素人嘉賓們帶著成熟與期待，在摩登都市上海入住郊區小屋，從陌生到熟悉，從心動到堅定，共同開啟一段30天的尋愛之旅；除了元老嘉賓謝楠、張純燁、唐藝昕之外，更邀請了徐藝洋和顏安等組成「半熟觀察員」，一同見證高甜瞬間。
